props.name: component
props.comment: Override the wrapper element type. Defaults to `"div"`.

props.name: fullWidth
props.comment: Expand the component to fill its container's width.

props.name: htmlFor
props.comment: When provided, sets the `for` attribute on the rendered `<label>` so clicking it focuses the associated input.

props.name: isRequired
props.comment: Whether to show a required indicator.

props.name: label
props.comment: Set to `false` to hide the label entirely.

props.name: resource
props.comment: Override the resource for label translation.

props.name: source
props.comment: Override the source for label translation.
